meta.title: Tevi Troy on Medicare and the 2012 Election for Fox Business
meta.description: Hudson Senior Fellow Tevi Troy joined Fox Business on September 6, 2011 to discuss his newest piece in Commentary Magazine entitled "Mediscare". The article can be read here: http://tinyurl.com/3epsu8v. How much will the debate over medicare affect the 2012 presidential election?
